Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.proofBuilderTests

Class ProofRebuildTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.proofBuilderTests.ProofRebuildTests
public class ProofRebuildTests extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProofRebuildTests()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    rebuildDeepSimplification()
    Ensures that the rebuild method still works when only half of an implication is simplified.
    void
    rebuildDoubleSimplification()
    Ensures that the rebuild method still works when there are multiple simplifications.
    void
    rebuildNoTryReplayUncertain()
    Ensures that tryReplayUncertain is taken into account when false.
    void
    rebuildTestConjunction()
    Ensures that the rebuild method still works when a conjunction is simplified.
    void
    rebuildTestConjunctionMore()
    Ensures that the rebuild method still works when a conjunction is augmented.
    void
    rebuildTestConjunctionMoreAndNew()
    Tests a bug that occurred when conjunction is augmented by 2 or more with a new predicate (ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException: 3 is thrown when bug is present).
    void
    rebuildTestImplication()
    Ensures that the rebuild method works with an implication.
    void
    rebuildTestImplications()
    Ensures that the rebuild method still works when a conjunction, with terms that aren't trivial cases, is simplified.
    void
    rebuildTestShuffledConjunction()
    Ensures that the rebuild method still works when the terms of a conjunction are shuffled.
    void
    rebuildTestSimplificationImplication()
    Ensures that the rebuild method still works when a subsumed implication is simplified.
    void
    rebuildTreeWithOpenNode()
    Ensures that the rebuild method still works when there is an open node.
    void
    rebuildTryReplayUncertainFailure()
    Ensures that a rebuild with uncertain rules maintains them if replay fails, and processes the subtree.
    void
    rebuildTryReplayUncertainSuccess()
    Ensures that a rebuild with uncertain rules replays the reasoners.
    void
    resetUncertain()

      public void rebuildTestConjunctionMore() throws Exception
      Ensures that the rebuild method still works when a conjunction is augmented.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildTestConjunctionMoreAndNew

      public void rebuildTestConjunctionMoreAndNew() throws Exception
      Tests a bug that occurred when conjunction is augmented by 2 or more with a new predicate (ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException: 3 is thrown when bug is present).
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildTestShuffledConjunction

      public void rebuildTestShuffledConjunction() throws Exception
      Ensures that the rebuild method still works when the terms of a conjunction are shuffled.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildTestImplication

      public void rebuildTestImplication() throws Exception
      Ensures that the rebuild method works with an implication.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildTestSimplificationImplication

      public void rebuildTestSimplificationImplication() throws Exception
      Ensures that the rebuild method still works when a subsumed implication is simplified.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildTestImplications

      public void rebuildTestImplications() throws Exception
      Ensures that the rebuild method still works when a conjunction, with terms that aren't trivial cases, is simplified.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildDeepSimplification

      public void rebuildDeepSimplification() throws Exception
      Ensures that the rebuild method still works when only half of an implication is simplified.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildDoubleSimplification

      public void rebuildDoubleSimplification() throws Exception
      Ensures that the rebuild method still works when there are multiple simplifications.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildTreeWithOpenNode

      public void rebuildTreeWithOpenNode() throws Exception
      Ensures that the rebuild method still works when there is an open node.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildTryReplayUncertainSuccess

      public void rebuildTryReplayUncertainSuccess() throws Exception
      Ensures that a rebuild with uncertain rules replays the reasoners.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildTryReplayUncertainFailure

      public void rebuildTryReplayUncertainFailure() throws Exception
      Ensures that a rebuild with uncertain rules maintains them if replay fails, and processes the subtree.

      The rule must be reused as is in the resulting proof tree, with an uncertain confidence.

      Throws:
      Exception

    • rebuildNoTryReplayUncertain

      public void rebuildNoTryReplayUncertain() throws Exception
      Ensures that tryReplayUncertain is taken into account when false.

      Rebuilds it without replaying uncertain rules, then checks that the rebuilt proof tree still is still uncertain.

      Throws:
      Exception
